phase_name: Fix: tomli missing from venv — LLM step fails with ModuleNotFoundError
goal: llm.py tries `import tomllib` (Python 3.11+ stdlib) and falls back to `import tomli as tomllib` (third-party). The venv runs Python 3.9.6 (Xcode), so tomllib is absent from the stdlib. tomli was never added to the pip install in run_setup_commands(), so neither import succeeds and the LLM step fails immediately. Fix: (1) add tomli to the pip install so new venvs include it; (2) add venv_tomli_ok() health check; (3) extend the existing venv-repair gate in run_app() to also trigger on missing tomli.
root_cause: run_setup_commands() installs 'numpy<2 openai-whisper ollama' but not 'tomli'. llm.py's module-level import of tomli fails at process start, before any LLM call is made, producing ModuleNotFoundError propagated to the user as 'LLM generation failed'.

tasks.title: Add `"tomli"` to pip install args in `run_setup_commands()` (`src/app.rs`)
tasks.description:
One-arg change: append `"tomli"` to the pip install args so every new venv includes it.

Current:
```rust
.args(["install", "--quiet", "numpy<2", "openai-whisper", "ollama"])
```

Replace with:
```rust
.args(["install", "--quiet", "numpy<2", "openai-whisper", "ollama", "tomli"])
```
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Remove `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/`; trigger first-launch setup; confirm `pip show tomli` in the new venv shows a version.

tasks.title: Add `fn venv_tomli_ok() -> bool` to `src/app.rs`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With tomli absent from venv (Python 3.9): `venv_tomli_ok()` returns false.
With tomli installed in venv: `venv_tomli_ok()` returns true.

tasks.title: Extend the venv-repair gate in `run_app()` to also trigger on `!venv_tomli_ok()`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With tomli absent from venv: launch app — venv is deleted, 'Setting up YapTap' alert appears, new venv has tomli installed.
With healthy venv (numpy 1.x, tomli present): launch app — no setup alert, tray icon appears directly.

tasks.title: Verify `cargo build`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test` pass clean
tasks.description: After P11-T001 through P11-T003, confirm no regressions.

tasks.title: End-to-end: install tomli into existing venv, confirm LLM step works without rebuild
tasks.description:
Quick verification using the existing venv (avoids 30-second full rebuild).

1. `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/pip install tomli --quiet`
2. Run `arch -x86_64 ~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/python -c "import tomli; print('tomli ok', tomli.__version__)"`
3. Confirm `venv_tomli_ok()` logic returns true: `arch -x86_64 ~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/python -c "import sys; m='tomllib' if sys.version_info>=(3,11) else 'tomli'; __import__(m); print('ok')"`
checks: The LLM step no longer triggers 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named tomli'.
